mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines > 0.5pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and employment signals expanding real economic activity that drives equity earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to explain more than 15% of SPX return variation in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer spending growth measured by RSAFS indicates robust demand conditions that support equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of periods when RSAFS growth exceeds 1.5% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% as measured by CPIAUCSL triggers expectations of monetary policy tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.0% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals weakening real economic activity that reduces equity earnings prospects, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO declines > 1.0% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above 450K units indicate strong demand for residential construction that boosts related corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 450K units.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts indicates broad-based demand expansion that drives equity earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of GDPC1 and HOUST fails to explain more than 20% of SPX return variation in 3-year rolling windows.
